goal: Supabase/Postgres-backed multi-organization Orun SaaS control plane
notes: Task 0076 verified PASS and merged via PR #119 (squash merge commit fb66ff5d7d134e8077fd5104bc8bbb9007d9bcd7) on 2026-05-29.
Original PR CI run 26611508443 (27/27 SUCCESS); post-implementer-report PR CI run 26611795386 (27/27 SUCCESS) after verifier committed missing implementer report (commit 4a353a5).
First billing runtime/API read surface live on main: apps/billing-worker with five GET routes (plans, customer, summary, invoices, entitlements) plus apps/api-edge billing facade forwarding to it.
Authorization uses membership-worker authorization-context + policy-worker billing.read; fails closed to no-enumeration 404s; raw bearer tokens never forwarded across the binding seam.

Stage/prod billing-worker is private (workers_dev: false) with same-environment SOURCEPLANE_DB / MEMBERSHIP_WORKER / POLICY_WORKER bindings; api-edge stage/prod bind BILLING_WORKER to billing-worker-{stage,prod} and depend on billing-worker.
No mutations, no provider SDK, no webhook handling, no UI, no schema, no Queue/KV/DO/AE/Terraform churn introduced. 24 billing-worker tests and 14 api-edge billing-facade tests added.
